Name: REINFORCE_PARAM_WEAPON_ST
Description: Determines the parameters for reinforcing weapons.

Fields.Name: Physical Damage
Fields.Description: The multiplier to apply to base physical damage for this tier of reinforcement.

Fields.Name: Magic Damage
Fields.Description: The multiplier to apply to base magic damage for this tier of reinforcement.

Fields.Name: Fire Damage
Fields.Description: The multiplier to apply to base fire damage for this tier of reinforcement.

Fields.Name: Lightning Damage
Fields.Description: The multiplier to apply to base lightning damage for this tier of reinforcement.

Fields.Name: Stamina Damage
Fields.Description: The multiplier to apply to base stamina damage for this tier of reinforcement.

Fields.Name: Poise Damage
Fields.Description: The multiplier to apply to base poise damage for this tier of reinforcement.

Fields.Name: Poise
Fields.Description: The multiplier to apply to base poise for this tier of reinforcement.

Fields.Name: Correction: STR
Fields.Description: The multiplier to apply to base STR correction for this tier of reinforcement.

Fields.Name: Correction: DEX
Fields.Description: The multiplier to apply to base DEX correction for this tier of reinforcement.

Fields.Name: Correction: INT
Fields.Description: The multiplier to apply to base INT correction for this tier of reinforcement.

Fields.Name: Correction: FTH
Fields.Description: The multiplier to apply to base FTH correction for this tier of reinforcement.

Fields.Name: Guard Absorption %: Physical
Fields.Description: The multiplier to apply to base physical guard absorption for this tier of reinforcement.

Fields.Name: Guard Absorption %: Magic
Fields.Description: The multiplier to apply to base magic guard absorption for this tier of reinforcement.

Fields.Name: Guard Absorption %: Fire
Fields.Description: The multiplier to apply to base fire guard absorption for this tier of reinforcement.

Fields.Name: Guard Absorption %: Lightning
Fields.Description: The multiplier to apply to base lightning guard absorption for this tier of reinforcement.

Fields.Name: Guard Absorption %: Poison
Fields.Description: The multiplier to apply to base poison guard absorption for this tier of reinforcement.

Fields.Name: Guard Absorption %: Toxic
Fields.Description: The multiplier to apply to base toxic guard absorption for this tier of reinforcement.

Fields.Name: Guard Absorption %: Bleed
Fields.Description: The multiplier to apply to base bleed guard absorption for this tier of reinforcement.

Fields.Name: Guard Absorption %: Curse
Fields.Description: The multiplier to apply to base curse guard absorption for this tier of reinforcement.

Fields.Name: Guard Stability
Fields.Description: The multiplier to apply to base guard stability for this tier of reinforcement.

Fields.Name: Hit SpEffect Offset: 1
Fields.Description: The ID offset applied to the weapon's spEffectId1 field value.

Fields.Name: Hit SpEffect Offset: 2
Fields.Description: The ID offset applied to the weapon's spEffectId2 field value.

Fields.Name: Hit SpEffect Offset: 3
Fields.Description: The ID offset applied to the weapon's spEffectId3 field value.

Fields.Name: Resident SpEffect Offset: 1
Fields.Description: The ID offset applied to the weapon's residentSpEffectId1 field value.

Fields.Name: Resident SpEffect Offset: 2
Fields.Description: The ID offset applied to the weapon's residentSpEffectId1 field value.

Fields.Name: Resident SpEffect Offset: 3
Fields.Description: The ID offset applied to the weapon's residentSpEffectId1 field value.

Fields.Name: Material Set Offset
Fields.Description: The ID offset applied to the weapon's materialSetId field value.

Fields.Name: Reinforcement Level
Fields.Description: The reinforcement level this tier is counted as.
